title: Order service p99 spike (major faults under memory pressure)
narrative: 2am page: order-service p99 jumped. No deploy. Traffic steady. Only ~1% of requests are slow.

groundTruth.mechanism: major page faults due to tight memory limit + cold working set
notes: Working set recently increased (new feature loads a larger product catalog into memory).
Container memory limit is near the working set size.
Reclaim causes pages to be evicted; rare requests touch cold pages and trigger major faults.
CPU utilization is moderate; tail is mostly waiting for disk/swap IO.

terminal.help:
Allowed commands are intentionally limited. Examples:
  top -bn1
  free -m
  vmstat 1 5
  cat /proc/vmstat
  grep -E pgmajfault
  /usr/bin/time -v <cmd> (simulated)
  dmesg | tail (pipes not allowed; use: dmesg -T)

This terminal does NOT execute on your machine.

cat.error: only a few /proc and cgroup files are available

grep.error: grep is only allowed as: grep -E <pattern> /proc/vmstat
